lines.speaker: Kali
lines.text: I'm on duty, so you'll need to make this quick.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Kali
lines.text: I typically hang out in the lab and keep an eye the newbies. Someone needs to make sure no one breaks anything or loses an eye.

lines.speaker: Kali
lines.text: Last week we had someone trying to churn butter in the agitator. They weren't around for long. I really wish they'd start properly vetting new society members.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks! I'd better be going now.

lines.speaker: Kali
lines.text: For me, its the Anti-leech lotion. I despise leeches.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that's surprising. I don't think I've seen many around here...

lines.speaker: Kali
lines.text: You've obviously never been swimming anywhere in the Tlati Rainforest...
